module.name: Sales Demo Data
module.author: System
module.description: Seeds the SalesRecord dynamic table with 60 rows of demo sales data and provides 6 sample chart queries. Import this module, then visit /__demo/seed-sales as an admin/developer to populate the data.

scripts.script:
from app.models import DynamicModel import random from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta import time as _t if not current_user or not current_user.is_authenticated: _result = "

Access Denied

You must be logged in as admin or developer.

" elif current_user.role not in ('admin', 'developer'): _result = "

Access Denied

Only admins and developers can seed demo data.

" else: Sales = DynamicModel.get_or_create('SalesRecord', { 'product': db.String(100), 'region': db.String(50), 'quarter': db.String(10), 'units_sold': db.Integer, 'revenue': db.Float, 'sale_date': db.DateTime, }) existing = session.query(Sales).count() if existing > 0: _result = f"

Already Seeded

SalesRecord already has {existing} rows. Delete them from Data admin first if you want to re-seed.

" else: products = ['Widget Pro', 'Gadget X', 'Thingamajig', 'Doohickey', 'Whatsit'] regions = ['North', 'South', 'East', 'West'] quarters = ['Q1 2025', 'Q2 2025', 'Q3 2025', 'Q4 2025', 'Q1 2026', 'Q2 2026'] base_date = datetime(2025, 1, 15, tzinfo=timezone.utc) t0 = _t.time() for i in range(60): q = random.choice(quarters) record = Sales( product=random.choice(products), region=random.choice(regions), quarter=q, units_sold=random.randint(10, 500), revenue=round(random.uniform(1000, 50000), 2), sale_date=base_date + timedelta(days=random.randint(0, 540)), ) session.add(record) session.commit() elapsed = int((_t.time() - t0) * 1000) _result = f"

Sales Data Seeded

Inserted 60 sales records in {elapsed}ms.

Now go to Query Reports and explore the sales queries.

"

query_report.name: Sales by Product and Region
query_report.description: Total units sold and revenue grouped by product and region.
query_report.sql: SELECT product, region, SUM(units_sold) as total_units, ROUND(SUM(revenue), 2) as total_revenue FROM salesrecord GROUP BY product, region ORDER BY product, region

query_report.name: Revenue by Quarter
query_report.description: Total revenue across each quarter as a line chart to show trends over time.
query_report.sql: SELECT quarter, ROUND(SUM(revenue), 2) as total_revenue FROM salesrecord GROUP BY quarter ORDER BY quarter

query_report.name: Sales by Region
query_report.description: Distribution of total units sold across regions.
query_report.sql: SELECT region, SUM(units_sold) as total_units FROM salesrecord GROUP BY region ORDER BY total_units DESC

query_report.name: Top Products by Revenue
query_report.sql: SELECT product, ROUND(SUM(revenue), 2) as total_revenue FROM salesrecord GROUP BY product ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

query_report.name: Quarterly Product Revenue
query_report.description: Revenue per product across four quarters — shows which products drive revenue each quarter.
query_report.sql: SELECT product, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN quarter='Q1 2025' THEN revenue ELSE 0 END), 2) as "Q1 2025", ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN quarter='Q2 2025' THEN revenue ELSE 0 END), 2) as "Q2 2025", ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN quarter='Q3 2025' THEN revenue ELSE 0 END), 2) as "Q3 2025", ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN quarter='Q4 2025' THEN revenue ELSE 0 END), 2) as "Q4 2025" FROM salesrecord GROUP BY product ORDER BY product

query_report.name: Region Performance by Product
query_report.chart_title: Units Sold by Region and Product
query_report.description: Breakdown of units sold per product in each region.
query_report.sql: SELECT region, SUM(CASE WHEN product='Widget Pro' THEN units_sold ELSE 0 END) as "Widget Pro", SUM(CASE WHEN product='Gadget X' THEN units_sold ELSE 0 END) as "Gadget X", SUM(CASE WHEN product='Thingamajig' THEN units_sold ELSE 0 END) as "Thingamajig", SUM(CASE WHEN product='Doohickey' THEN units_sold ELSE 0 END) as "Doohickey", SUM(CASE WHEN product='Whatsit' THEN units_sold ELSE 0 END) as "Whatsit" FROM salesrecord GROUP BY region ORDER BY region
